title: Dolt: This Makes SQL Feel Like Git
summary: Dolt is a SQL database that applies Git-style version control workflows to structured data tables. It enables branches, commits, diffs, merges, pull requests, and rollbacks for databases, addressing collaboration and data versioning challenges in ML datasets, test data, and production environments.
